product: Explore table data using an LLM (Public Preview)
tagline: You can now ask natural language questions about sample data using Catalog Explorer.
what_it_does: You can now ask natural language questions about sample data using Catalog Explorer. The Assistant uses metadata context and table usage patterns to generate a SQL query. You can then validate the query and run it against the underlying table.
why_it_matters: You can navigate Unity Catalog governed database objects in Catalog Explorer without active compute.
key_takeaway: You can now ask natural language questions about sample data using Catalog Explorer.
